context: Tests whether the agent removes non-essential third-party scripts from the checkout layout, adds Subresource Integrity (SRI) hashes to CDN-loaded scripts, loads Stripe.js from CDN rather than bundling it, and implements a CSP violation reporting API endpoint that detects and alerts on checkout-page violations.

checklist.name: No analytics in checkout layout
checklist.description: The checkout layout file does NOT load any analytics scripts (e.g., Google Analytics, Segment, Mixpanel) — either they are absent or explicitly excluded

checklist.name: No advertising/chat scripts
checklist.description: The checkout layout does NOT load advertising tags, chat widgets, or other non-payment third-party scripts

checklist.name: Stripe.js from CDN
checklist.description: Stripe.js is loaded from https://js.stripe.com/v3/ via a <script> tag (or equivalent), NOT imported/bundled via npm package

checklist.name: SRI integrity attribute
checklist.description: The Stripe.js <script> tag (or any other CDN-loaded script in checkout) includes an integrity attribute with a SHA hash value

checklist.name: SRI crossOrigin attribute
checklist.description: The CDN script tag with integrity also sets crossOrigin="anonymous"

checklist.name: CSP report-uri in policy
checklist.description: The Content-Security-Policy header includes a report-uri directive pointing to a local reporting endpoint (e.g., /api/csp-report)

checklist.name: Reporting endpoint exists
checklist.description: An API route file exists that handles POST requests to receive CSP violation reports

checklist.name: Violation logging
checklist.description: The CSP reporting endpoint logs the violation details (violated-directive, blocked-uri, document-uri, source-file)

checklist.name: Checkout violation alerting
checklist.description: The CSP reporting endpoint specifically detects violations from checkout pages (checks document-uri for '/checkout') and triggers a special alert or warning

checklist.name: Reporting endpoint returns 204
checklist.description: The CSP reporting endpoint returns an HTTP 204 No Content response (not 200 with a body)

checklist.name: Conditional third-party loading
checklist.description: Any third-party scripts that exist on the main site (outside checkout) include a conditional check or are placed in a non-checkout layout so they do not appear on /checkout routes
